codeReview.summary: Excellent test suite with 33 test cases covering all 12 validation assertions (VAL-STREAK-COMP-001 through VAL-STREAK-COMP-012) plus 5 additional edge cases. The tests are well-structured with a clean setupMocks helper, proper use of jest.useFakeTimers for date-dependent logic, and thorough boundary testing for emoji ranges, intensity classes, and streak messages. All 33 tests pass, lint is clean, and the full suite of 286 tests passes without regressions.

summary: The StudyStreak test suite is comprehensive and high-quality. All 12 validation assertions are fully covered with 28 dedicated tests plus 5 additional edge cases (progress bar capping, argument verification, title attributes, badge detail rendering). The worker followed the test-worker skill procedure exactly — read source, read conventions, wrote tests, ran tests, fixed an initial failure (milestone badge text vs title attribute), ran lint, ran full suite. The setupMocks helper pattern is clean and reusable. Fake timers are used correctly for date-dependent getDayLabel logic. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
